caveat: GOLD-CANDIDATE (sandbox, pre-promotion). One row per source line. amount_semantics distinguishes po_committed/payment_actual/contract_award_value; only value_safe_to_sum (po_committed+payment_actual) may be totalled, labelled 'ordered/paid', never mixed with award ceilings. PRIVACY QUARANTINE IS DEFERRED: rows flagged privacy_status=review_personal_data are NOT yet excluded (public_display=True for all) — a quarantine pass must run before any UI use. A line is a purchase order or payment record, not evidence of influence.
